description: Composition football jersey made of 100% polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technology and Stay Cool design, has open mesh panels at the sides and closed mesh panels at the lower back, V-neck, short sleeves, rubber print nike swoosh on the right front, perforated stripe across chest, logo and team name on the back and manchester united badge printed on the front left Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours Do not soak or bleach Dry immediately after washing Tumble dry low Cool iron but do not iron over print Do not dry clean Wear your team's colours with pride - no Manchester United fan should be without this nike jersey. The striped panels in different tones of red give a stylish look to a sporty top. This sweat-wicking jersey is made of Dri-FIT fabric equivalent of eight recycled plastic bottles, thereby making it a great buy for the environment conscious. Model statistics Product is a size M of height 6', chest 39" shoulders 18"
